title: 🔥存量博弈资金困守
body: 市场处于典型的存量博弈阶段。BTC.D 报 59.9%，7 日微跌 0.6%，资金并未显著外溢至山寨币，避险情绪依然浓厚。当前价格低于 200 日定投成本，表明 BTC 自身吸引力不足，但场内缺乏能承接流动性的替代板块。高控盘状态下资金空转，无法形成有效合力。中性。轮动何时开启？
body_en: The market is in a classic zero-sum game phase. BTC.D sits at 59.9%, down just 0.6% over the last 7 days—capital isn't spilling into alts, and risk-off sentiment remains thick. With price below the 200-day DCA cost, BTC itself lacks the pull to attract inflows, yet there’s no alternative sector capable of absorbing liquidity. Under tight control, funds are just churning in circles, failing to form any cohesive buying power. Neutral. When does the rotation start?
